Freesound CC0 combat impact collection
All sounds below are licensed CC0 1.0 Universal (Public Domain Dedication)
https://creativecommons.org/publicdomain/zero/1.0/
Selected via Freesound's license filter: license:"Creative Commons 0".
CC0 was re-verified on each individual sound page at download time.
Files are Freesound's HQ Ogg Vorbis encodes of the CC0 originals.
Downloaded: 2026-07-24. No attribution required; credits retained as thanks.

File -> Freesound source (id, author, original title):

Surface impacts — concrete / stone:
impact-concrete-chip-1_fs321478.ogg
  https://freesound.org/s/321478/ — dslrguide — "Concrete Hit 2"
impact-stone-rubble-2_fs569510.ogg
  https://freesound.org/s/569510/ — Sheyvan — "Stone Impact Rubble Debris 14"
impact-stone-debris-3_fs554148.ogg
  https://freesound.org/s/554148/ — Nox_Sound — "Foley_Impact_Stones_Strong_Debris_Stereo_DS.wav"
impact-gravel-falls-4_fs179341.ogg
  https://freesound.org/s/179341/ — lolamadeus — "Gravel Impacts and Falls.wav"

Surface impacts — dirt / sand:
impact-dirt-thud-1_fs319222.ogg
  https://freesound.org/s/319222/ — worthahep88 — "Single Rock hit Dirt.wav"

  https://freesound.org/s/319229/ — worthahep88 — "Single Rock hit dirt 2.wav"
impact-sand-hard-3_fs683788.ogg
  https://freesound.org/s/683788/ — Elements-Library — "Hard Impact on Sand"
impact-sand-heavy-4_fs543699.ogg
  https://freesound.org/s/543699/ — 200221-WeanBekker — "Heavy sand impacts.wav"

  https://freesound.org/s/148827/ — cedarstudios — ".22 ricochet.mp3"

  https://freesound.org/s/148840/ — cedarstudios — "ricochet.mp3"
ricochet-bullet-7_fs30932.ogg
  https://freesound.org/s/30932/ — aust_paul — "bullet ricochet.wav"

  https://freesound.org/s/147261/ — JohnDelayniKIng — "Shotgun shell ejection.aif"
